name: deploy-test
description: Minimal Nuxt 4 + Postgres + better-auth starter for validating one-click deploy flows (Vercel / Cloudflare Workers / Docker).

POSTGRES.description: Hyperdrive config pointing at your Postgres. Create one first via `wrangler hyperdrive create deploy-test --connection-string="postgresql://USER:PASS@HOST:5432/DB"`, then pick it here. See [docs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/hyperdrive/).

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Session / cookie encryption secret. **Required**. Generate a 32+ char random string with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

SYSTEM_ADMIN_EMAILS.description: Comma-separated emails. The **first** sign-up with a matching email is auto-promoted to admin — no seed account, no default password. Example: `you@example.com`. Change this before sharing the deploy URL.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. Google OAuth client ID. Create one at [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/auth/clients/create) with redirect URI `https://<your-worker>.workers.dev/api/auth/callback/google`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. GitHub OAuth client ID. Create an app at [GitHub Developer Settings](https://github.com/settings/applications/new) with callback URL `https://<your-worker>.workers.dev/api/auth/callback/github`.

AUTH_EMAIL_ENABLED.description: Optional. Force-toggle email+password login. Values: `true` / `false`. Default: enabled iff no OAuth is configured.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: Optional. Resend API key. When set, email verification auto-activates on signup. Get one at [resend.com/api-keys](https://resend.com/api-keys).

RESEND_FROM.description: Optional. From address for verification mails. Defaults to `onboarding@resend.dev` (only delivers to the Resend account owner's inbox until you verify a custom domain).

AUTH_EMAIL_VERIFICATION.description: Optional. Force-toggle email verification. Values: `true` / `false`. Default: enabled iff email login is on and `RESEND_API_KEY` is set.
